# .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md

---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the project.
title: "[BUG] - Brief description of the bug" # Pre-fills the issue title
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"] # Add relevant labels
assignees: ["your-github-username"] # Optional: Assign specific users
---

**1. Detailed Description:**
> Describe the bug clearly and concisely. What happened?

**2. Steps to Reproduce:**
1.  [First Step]
2.  [Second Step]
3.  [Third Step]
4.  ...

**3. Expected Behavior:**
> Describe what you expected to happen when performing the steps above.

**4. Actual Behavior:**
> Describe what actually happened. Include screenshots or copy/paste full error messages below.
> ```text
> <Paste any relevant logs or error messages here>
> ```

**5. Environment / Context:**
- **Operating System:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Project Version:** [e.g., v1.2.3, commit hash `abcdef1`]
- **Browser (if applicable):** [e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- **Other relevant context:** [e.g., Node.js v20.x]

**6. Additional Information (Optional):**
> Add any other context, links, or potential solutions you might have.
